title: Timeline resume, not resume colors
excerpt: The timeline deadline resume won’t work correct, just show de right color if had only 1 subitem. If i had 2 or more subitens.

posts.author: marciosato (Marcio Yoshinori Sato)
posts.cookedHtml:
timeline wont resume correct346×1309 34.9 KB

The timeline deadline resume won’t work correct, just show de right color if had only 1 subitem. If i had 2 or more subitens.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marcio!

Charlotte here from the monday team! Just to clarify; is the issue you’re experiencing that the summary at the bottom of the timeline column is not matching the color of the timelines above it? If so, this is expected behavior.

The summary of the column will not show any red because the red color is just when you have “deadline mode” activated but it does not affect the summary shown at the bottom of the column.

Let us know what you would like to achieve here so we can help find a better solution for you!

posts.author: marciosato (Marcio Yoshinori Sato)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s it Charlotte. I want the deadline resume at the summary. Because i show this summary at another Dashboard to my boss. And i don’t want to create another collumn with this info
